checks.finding: design.md defines the shell-to-environment-to-quoted-Python verifier path, consent decision, existing bundle writer boundary, and cross-layer dependencies for REQ-001 through REQ-004.
The specified execution flow is unidirectional; no component dependency cycle is specified.
Process-local inputs, no persisted entities, and no migration are explicit.
The token format, canonical message order, exit codes, consent labels, and bundle contract are preserved.
security-spec.md specifies B1/B2, default deny, quoted environment reads, constant-time HMAC comparison, secret non-disclosure, and regression evidence.
Not a fullstack feature; no rendered UI, API client, or frontend bundle exists.
TEST-001 through TEST-007 cover HMAC acceptance, tampering, invalid token conditions, hostile operands, parity, and isolation.
All implementation components are defined in design.md.
No ADR is required for an internal correction with no public contract or data-model change.
ds_profile none and no UI surface make a design system inapplicable.
No domain model or persisted business domain is present.
